problems.root: confess relieves exposure_anxiety but probes re-raise it -> remain_silent re-fires; post-confession the matter is out, concealment is incoherent
avoid/remain_silent oscillate every tick; renderer lists each verbatim instead of compressing a sustained withdrawn spell
moral_confide has both interrogator probes and confidant -> confess + confide render as two disclosure beats
slow guilt lingers after confess/apologize -> demeanor still reads troubled; post-catharsis it should read relieved
same demeanor opens and closes unchanged -> trailing restate is padding
post-lie remain_silent renders as fresh concealment; same post-resolution pattern as #1

verdict: pipeline robust at 3x; orderings read correctly (02/07/08/10/11 strong); one REAL behavioral root (post-resolution re-conceal, #1/#5/#12) + several rendering-honesty fixes (#9 compression, #3/#6 relief, #10 dedupe, #4 double-disclosure).
